Welcome

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.5" _module_preset="default" header_2_text_align="left" header_2_text_color="gcid-heading-color" header_2_font_size="50px" custom_margin="||10px||false|false" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="bottom" animation_intensity_slide="10%" header_2_font_size_tablet="50px" header_2_font_size_phone="38px" header_2_font_size_last_edited="on|desktop" locked="off" global_colors_info="{%22gcid-112ad438-fb27-4e3b-93d3-86a7f5655c85%22:%91%22text_text_color%22%93,%22gcid-heading-color%22:%91%22header_2_text_color%22%93}"]

Specializing in Bulk Bark
and Mulch Distribution

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.5" _module_preset="default" custom_margin="||10px||false|false" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="bottom" animation_intensity_slide="6%" global_colors_info="{}"]

Central Valley Bulk Materials, Inc. is a family-owned and operated business that serves nurseries, major landscapers, and special projects throughout California. We want to be your first choice for bulk bark and mulch distribution in California.

You and your business will feel comfortable working with us because of our family values of trust, honesty and continual focus on quality.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.5" _module_preset="default" text_font="|700|||||||" text_text_color="#0A0A0A" text_font_size="20px" animation_style="slide" animation_direction="bottom" animation_intensity_slide="6%" global_colors_info="{}"]— Mr. Seth Chastain[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.27.5" _module_preset="default" background_enable_image="off" background_position="center_left" background_horizontal_offset="9%" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_image src="https://centralvalleybulkmaterials.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Front-Tractor.webp" alt="Front" title_text="Front-Tractor" _builder_version="4.27.5" _module_preset="default" custom_padding="||0px||false|false" border_radii="on|12px|12px|12px|12px" border_width_bottom="6px" border_color_bottom="rgba(244,189,23,0.34)" global_colors_info="{}"][/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]
